title: AutoQuant Handoff Checkpoint
description: Lightweight checkpoint for session continuity. Pointer-based (not full logs).

ts_created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when handoff was created

session_id.description: Optional: OpenClaw session key or identifier

status.description: One-liner: overall state (e.g., 'Telegram automation live, memory polish in progress')

pointers.description: Relevant file paths and line ranges for context

notes.description: Freeform notes about context, decisions, or gotchas
